title: What I know of the Holy Spirit
subtitle: Guarded Understanding; structured belief under active revision
description: An artifact documenting a theological orientation through humility. It explores the tension between structured doctrinal formulation and the destabilizing encounter with divine mystery, emphasizing reverence over mastery.

motifMap.meaning: Structured thought illuminating a small circle while acknowledging the surrounding shadow of mystery.

excerpt: The moment I think I truly understand God… is the moment I have gone wrong.

sourceInputs: Phase Analysis 3.0 — “What I know of the Holy Spirit”

integrity.notes: Generated based on Phase Analysis 3.0. Identified as 'Guarded Understanding' variant of The Candle's Embrace. Family set to Candle Family.
